creator: maxim.usatov@bcsatellite.net
text: I have kernel{arc_prune} stuck at 100% CPU with system completely unresponsive on FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE releng/13.3-n257428-80d2b634ddf0. Can reproduce every time by doing rsync from internal ZFS NVMe storage to an external UFS SATA drive attached via USB. Is there a hope of getting this fixed in 13.3 as well?
